detail: end-to-end validated: new repo claude-setup-smoketest created under matthew/, identity auto-applied, GitHub private repo created, push succeeded without token prompt

output.result: matthew/.gitconfig + credential store setup validated; git push works with no manual config

intent: The github credentials in ~/.git-credentials aren't mine. This is a shared machine. This repo, and *ALL REPOS UNDER /matthew* should use MY KEYS! We have this problem every time and it is exhausting. How should we approach this?
name: git-credentials path-specific override
